_note: MCP server catalog for spark-sovereign. Copy server blocks into config/openclaw.json mcpServers to enable them. npm packages use npx -y. Python packages use uvx (install uv first: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh).

filesystem._description: Read, write, search, move files. Most essential server.

git._description: Git operations — commit, branch, diff, log, stash.

github._description: GitHub API — PRs, issues, code search, releases.

fetch._description: HTTP requests to any API or URL.

puppeteer._description: Headless browser — navigate, click, screenshot, scrape.

postgres._description: SQL queries against any PostgreSQL DB including pgvector.

memory._description: Built-in MCP knowledge graph for in-session entity memory. Complements pgvector.

sequential-thinking._description: Structured multi-step reasoning tool. Helps Brain decompose complex tasks.

slack._description: Read channels, send messages, search Slack history.

aws._description: AWS operations — S3, EC2, Lambda, CloudWatch, DynamoDB.

stripe._description: Stripe API — customers, subscriptions, invoices, refunds.

_notes.no_official_docker_mcp: There is no official @modelcontextprotocol/server-docker package. Use the fetch or shell approach for Docker API calls, or the puppeteer server to automate Portainer.
_notes.no_official_shell_mcp: There is no official @modelcontextprotocol/server-shell package. NemoClaw's OpenShell sandbox provides safe command execution natively without needing a separate MCP server.
_notes.git_is_python: mcp-server-git is Python-only (uvx mcp-server-git). There is no @modelcontextprotocol/server-git npm package.
_notes.fetch_is_python: mcp-server-fetch is Python-only (uvx mcp-server-fetch). There is no @modelcontextprotocol/server-fetch npm package.
_notes.uvx_prereq: uvx requires uv: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
